Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover

Class ReasonerRegistry

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.ReasonerRegistry
All Implemented Interfaces:
IReasonerRegistry
public class ReasonerRegistry extends Object implements IReasonerRegistry
Singleton class implementing the reasoner registry. Reasoner IDs with a version number are accepted as input parameters.
See Also:

  • Method Details

    • getReasonerRegistry

      public static ReasonerRegistry getReasonerRegistry()

    • isRegistered

      public boolean isRegistered(String id)
      Description copied from interface: IReasonerRegistry
      Checks if a reasoner extension with the given reasoner id is present in the reasoner registry.

      This is fully equivalent to Arrays.asList(getReasonerIDs()).contains(reasonerID), although implemented in a more efficient way.

      Specified by:
      isRegistered in interface IReasonerRegistry
      Parameters:
      id - the reasoner id to check for
      Returns:
      true iff the given reasoner id is known to the reasoner registry

    • getRegisteredIDs

      public String[] getRegisteredIDs()
      Description copied from interface: IReasonerRegistry
      Returns the ids of all reasoner extensions that have been registered.
      Specified by:
      getRegisteredIDs in interface IReasonerRegistry
      Returns:
      an array of all registered reasoner ids

    • getReasonerDesc

      public ReasonerDesc getReasonerDesc(String id)
      Description copied from interface: IReasonerRegistry
      Returns the descriptor of the reasoner with the given id.

      In case no reasoner extension with the given id has been registered, a placeholder descriptor is returned. Subsequently, the reasoner is considered as registered (with a dummy instance).

      Alternatively, the given parameter can be an encoding of both the id and the version of a reasoner, as returned by IReasonerDesc.getVersionedId(). In this case, the returned descriptor will bear the encoded version (fetched through IReasonerDesc.getVersion()) instead of the registered version.

      Specified by:
      getReasonerDesc in interface IReasonerRegistry
      Parameters:
      id - the id of a reasoner; alternatively, the encoding of an id with a version
      Returns:
      a descriptor of the reasoner with the given id

    • getLiveReasonerDesc

      public IReasonerDesc getLiveReasonerDesc(String id)

    • loadRegistry

      private void loadRegistry()
      Initializes the registry using extensions to the reasoner extension point.

    • isDummyReasoner

      public boolean isDummyReasoner(IReasoner reasoner)
      Description copied from interface: IReasonerRegistry
      Checks whether a given reasoner is a dummy reasoner.

      A dummy reasoner is used as a facade to a reasoner that is not currently installed so that the rule provided by it may be used in the proof tree and serialized. A dummy reasoner cannot be replayed. An attempt to call the apply() method on it will always return an IReasonerFailure.

      Specified by:
      isDummyReasoner in interface IReasonerRegistry
      Parameters:
      reasoner - the reasoner to check
      Returns:
      true iff the given reasoner is a dummy reasoner
